caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black gaming headset with a microphone is centered against a plain, neutral-colored wall. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands as he looks toward the camera. Across the sequence, he shifts his posture and hand positions; in the initial moment, his hands are held low and close to his chest, but he soon raises them to gesture more emphatically, bringing his fingers together and moving his arms outward. The on-screen text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom-left corner of each scene. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle is a steady medium shot, focusing on the man from the chest up as he communicates.
